Document:
# Core Rule 9 - Losing is part of the game.
- Rule 9 should be represented by the way you play the game.
- It is not a fair game, and it is important to play with a positive attitude, even when things do not go your way.
- sometimes antagonist rounds get ruined due to either other antagonists, mistakes, or being foiled by crew. - You should not be playing to win, and not rage in chat or AHelps if you happen to have a round that is impacted by dying or losing.
